manifest.concept_text: In a dimly lit, abandoned cathedral hall, Helen strides toward a stained-glass altar. The wide cinematic frame holds her full figure, her copper-red wavy hair catching the faint light from above, while her blue-grey eyes gaze straight ahead. Her fair skin bears visible freckles under the moody, atmospheric shadows.
